base_tile.source_sprite: 128x128 final PNG cell for floor tiles with transparent padding
base_tile.logical_model_tile: 64x48 art inside a 64x64 square canvas before nearest-neighbor 2x export

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_segment_ne_h3m
sprites.note: Rear warehouse wall segment, NE back-side orientation, approx 3m tall if one tile is 1.5m.

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_segment_ne_h6m
sprites.note: Rear warehouse wall segment, NE back-side orientation, approx 6m tall if one tile is 1.5m.

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_segment_nw_h3m
sprites.note: Rear warehouse wall segment, NW back-side orientation, approx 3m tall if one tile is 1.5m.

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_segment_nw_h6m
sprites.note: Rear warehouse wall segment, NW back-side orientation, approx 6m tall if one tile is 1.5m.

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_corner_back_h3m
sprites.note: Back warehouse wall corner joining NE and NW wall runs, approx 3m tall.

sprites.name: warehouse_wall_corner_back_h6m
sprites.note: Back warehouse wall corner joining NE and NW wall runs, approx 6m tall.

exit_gate_conveyor_3x1.meaning: Cardinal east/south/west/north roll-up exit gate with moving conveyor belt and parcels.

visual_wall_modules.tile_scale: 1 tile is treated as roughly 1.5m x 1.5m in-world.
visual_wall_modules.rendering_rule: Use only on the rear two warehouse sides; omit or hide front walls like a Sims-style cutaway.
